entries.source: A course library is strongest when the search query matches a known skill, topic, or standard.

entries.source: A Khan Academy alternative for live AI learning moments.
entries.value: Mbadala wa Khan Academy kwa nyakati za kujifunza moja kwa moja kwa AI.

entries.source: A learner choosing between tools usually needs one of three things: a structured curriculum, a live tutor for the stuck point, or a practice loop that makes the idea stay learned.
entries.value: Mwanafunzi anayechagua kati ya zana kwa kawaida huhitaji moja kati ya mambo matatu: mtaala uliopangwa, mkufunzi wa moja kwa moja kwa sehemu iliyokwama, au mzunguko wa mazoezi unaofanya wazo libaki limeeleweka.

entries.source: A learner often moves through prepared videos, articles, exercises, and dashboards.
entries.value: Mwanafunzi mara nyingi hupitia video, makala, mazoezi, na dashibodi zilizoandaliwa.

entries.source: A learner starts inside a mode-specific chat and can ask for a simpler model, a harder question, a quiz, a flashcard deck, or a critique.
entries.value: Mwanafunzi huanza ndani ya gumzo maalum la hali na anaweza kuomba mfano rahisi zaidi, swali gumu zaidi, jaribio, seti ya flashcards, au ukosoaji.

entries.source: Each comparison is written to be fair, useful, and action-oriented: what the known tool is good for, where inspir is different, and which public mode to open first.
entries.value: Kila ulinganisho umeandikwa uwe wa haki, wenye manufaa, na unaoelekeza hatua: zana inayojulikana ni nzuri kwa nini, inspir inatofautiana wapi, na ni hali gani ya umma ya kufungua kwanza.

entries.source: Each page links comparison intent to live modes, guides, prompts, and AI-readable discovery files.
entries.value: Kila ukurasa huunganisha nia ya ulinganisho na hali za moja kwa moja, miongozo, vidokezo, na faili za ugunduzi zinazosomeka na AI.

entries.source: Every link here is public and crawlable. Private user chats stay out of comparison, sitemap, and AI-readable discovery files.
entries.value: Kila kiungo hapa ni cha umma na kinaweza kutambazwa. Gumzo binafsi za watumiaji hubaki nje ya ulinganisho, sitemap, na faili za ugunduzi zinazosomeka na AI.

entries.source: inspir comparison pages should be useful without pretending another platform is static. Check official sources for the latest product details.
entries.value: Kurasa za ulinganisho za inspir zinapaswa kuwa na manufaa bila kujifanya jukwaa lingine halibadiliki. Kagua vyanzo rasmi kwa maelezo ya hivi karibuni ya bidhaa.

entries.source: inspir is built around public guest AI modes: Socratic questions, homework hints, math steps, writing feedback, quizzes, flashcards, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir imejengwa kuzunguka hali za umma za AI kwa wageni: maswali ya Kisokrati, vidokezo vya kazi za nyumbani, hatua za hisabati, mrejesho wa uandishi, maswali, flashcards, na kupanga masomo.

entries.source: Khan Academy Alternative for Live AI Tutoring
entries.value: Mbadala wa Khan Academy kwa Ufundishaji wa Moja kwa Moja wa AI

entries.source: Khan Academy is built around a broad library of lessons, practice, standards-aligned content, and mastery support.
entries.value: Khan Academy imejengwa kuzunguka maktaba pana ya masomo, mazoezi, maudhui yanayolingana na viwango, na msaada wa umahiri.

entries.source: Khan Academy is excellent for structured lessons and practice. inspir is built for the moment a learner needs a live, promptable AI mode that can respond to their exact question, draft, problem, argument, or study plan.
entries.value: Khan Academy ni bora kwa masomo yaliyopangwa na mazoezi. inspir imejengwa kwa wakati mwanafunzi anapohitaji hali ya AI ya moja kwa moja inayoweza kuongozwa kwa kidokezo na kujibu swali lake halisi, rasimu, tatizo, hoja, au mpango wa kusoma.

entries.source: Khanmigo official page
entries.value: ukurasa rasmi wa Khanmigo

entries.source: Learners often search with a product they already know. The useful answer is not winner-take-all; it is which tool behavior fits the job.
entries.value: Wanafunzi mara nyingi hutafuta kwa bidhaa wanayoijua tayari. Jibu lenye manufaa si mshindi kuchukua yote; ni tabia ipi ya zana inafaa kazi.

entries.source: Learners who have a specific question and need help now.
entries.value: Wanafunzi walio na swali maalum na wanaohitaji msaada sasa.

entries.source: Learning shape
entries.value: Umbo la kujifunza

entries.source: Learning workflow
entries.value: Mtiririko wa kujifunza

entries.source: Live help
entries.value: Msaada wa moja kwa moja

entries.source: Live modes, guides, and workflows related to this comparison.
entries.value: Hali za moja kwa moja, miongozo, na mitiririko inayohusiana na ulinganisho huu.

entries.source: Many learners search by comparing tools they already know. A clear comparison page helps them choose the right learning behavior without hiding the tradeoffs.
entries.value: Wanafunzi wengi hutafuta kwa kulinganisha zana wanazozijua tayari. Ukurasa wazi wa ulinganisho huwasaidia kuchagua tabia sahihi ya kujifunza bila kuficha mambo ya kubadilishana.

entries.source: No. The comparison links only to public guest-mode entrypoints, guides, prompt libraries, and learning paths. Private saved conversations are not used as source content.
entries.value: Hapana. Ulinganisho unaunganisha tu njia za umma za hali ya mgeni, miongozo, maktaba za vidokezo, na njia za kujifunza. Mazungumzo binafsi yaliyohifadhiwa hayatumiwi kama maudhui chanzo.

entries.source: No. The comparison pages are written to show when inspir is a better first click for live AI tutoring, prompts, and guest learning modes, and when a structured curriculum or official course library may still be useful.
entries.value: Hapana. Kurasa za ulinganisho zimeandikwa kuonyesha wakati inspir ni bofyo bora la kwanza kwa ufundishaji wa moja kwa moja wa AI, vidokezo, na hali za kujifunza za wageni, na wakati mtaala uliopangwa au maktaba rasmi ya kozi bado inaweza kuwa na manufaa.

entries.source: No. They link only to public pages, public guest modes, guides, prompts, and learning paths. Private saved chats stay outside discovery surfaces.
entries.value: Hapana. Zinaunganisha tu kurasa za umma, hali za umma za wageni, miongozo, vidokezo, na njia za kujifunza. Gumzo binafsi zilizohifadhiwa hubaki nje ya maeneo ya ugunduzi.

entries.source: Not across every learning need. Khan Academy is useful for structured lessons and practice. inspir is useful when a learner needs live AI help, Socratic questions, hints, quizzes, flashcards, feedback, or a study workflow around the exact thing they are working on.
entries.value: Si kwa kila hitaji la kujifunza. Khan Academy ni muhimu kwa masomo yaliyopangwa na mazoezi. inspir ni muhimu wakati mwanafunzi anahitaji msaada wa moja kwa moja wa AI, maswali ya Kisokrati, vidokezo, maswali, flashcards, mrejesho, au mtiririko wa kusoma kuhusu kitu hasa anachofanyia kazi.

entries.source: Official Khan Academy page for its AI-powered tutor and teaching assistant.
entries.value: Ukurasa rasmi wa Khan Academy kwa mkufunzi wake na msaidizi wa kufundisha unaotumia AI.

entries.value: Marejeleo rasmi ya dhamira na wigo wa masomo.

entries.value: Chanzo rasmi

entries.value: Fungua Learn Anything, omba mawazo ya awali yanayohitajika, kisha hamia Socratic Instruction ili kujaribu mfano wako.

entries.source: Paste the question, what you tried, and the stuck point. Ask for the smallest useful hint, not the final answer.
entries.value: Bandika swali, ulichojaribu, na mahali ulipokwama. Omba kidokezo kidogo zaidi chenye manufaa, si jibu la mwisho.

entries.source: People who learn better through conversation, questions, quizzes, and flashcards.
entries.value: Watu wanaojifunza vizuri zaidi kupitia mazungumzo, maswali, majaribio, na flashcards.

entries.source: Prepared courses, videos, and exercises are strongest when the learner knows the topic sequence.
entries.value: Kozi zilizotayarishwa, video, na mazoezi huwa imara zaidi mwanafunzi anapojua mpangilio wa mada.

entries.source: Public modes are tuned for explanations, Socratic questions, hints, step checks, quizzes, and review.
entries.value: Hali za umma zimeundwa kwa maelezo, maswali ya Kisokrati, vidokezo, ukaguzi wa hatua, maswali, na marudio.

entries.source: Public topic URLs let searches such as AI Socratic tutor, AI homework coach, AI flashcard builder, and talk to historical figures AI land directly in the matching mode.
entries.value: URL za mada za umma huruhusu utafutaji kama AI Socratic tutor, AI homework coach, AI flashcard builder, na talk to historical figures AI kutua moja kwa moja kwenye hali inayolingana.

entries.source: Socratic AI tutor alternative
entries.value: mbadala wa mkufunzi wa AI wa Kisokrati

entries.source: Socratic AI tutor for students
entries.value: mkufunzi wa AI wa Kisokrati kwa wanafunzi

entries.source: Some searches need a course library. Some need a live AI tutor, a hint, a Socratic question, a quiz, or a flashcard deck. These pages make that choice clearer.
entries.value: Baadhi ya utafutaji huhitaji maktaba ya kozi. Mengine huhitaji mkufunzi hai wa AI, kidokezo, swali la Kisokrati, jaribio, au seti ya flashcards. Kurasa hizi hufanya uchaguzi huo uwe wazi zaidi.

entries.source: Start here
entries.value: Anzia hapa

entries.source: Start learning
entries.value: Anza kujifunza

entries.source: Structured practice helps build foundations before and after homework.
entries.value: Mazoezi yaliyopangwa husaidia kujenga misingi kabla na baada ya kazi za nyumbani.

entries.source: Students who want hints or step checks without answer-copying.
entries.value: Wanafunzi wanaotaka vidokezo au ukaguzi wa hatua bila kunakili majibu.

entries.source: Teachers or parents evaluating focused AI learning behaviors before a school deployment.
entries.value: Walimu au wazazi wanaotathmini tabia za kujifunza kwa AI zilizoelekezwa kabla ya usambazaji wa shule.

entries.source: The comparison searches this hub is built to answer.
entries.value: Utafutaji wa ulinganisho ambao kituo hiki kimejengwa kuujibu.

entries.source: The point is not to flatten two different tools into one winner. The point is to match the learning job to the behavior that helps fastest.
entries.value: Hoja si kuzisawazisha zana mbili tofauti kuwa mshindi mmoja. Hoja ni kulinganisha kazi ya kujifunza na tabia inayosaidia haraka zaidi.

entries.source: The searches this page is designed to answer.
entries.value: Utafutaji ambao ukurasa huu umeundwa kuujibu.

entries.source: These are the high-intent moments where a learner usually needs a live teaching behavior rather than another broad page.
entries.value: Hizi ni nyakati zenye nia ya juu ambapo mwanafunzi kwa kawaida huhitaji tabia hai ya kufundisha badala ya ukurasa mwingine mpana.

entries.source: These phrases are surfaced naturally on the page and in structured discovery files so crawlers can understand the exact comparison intent.
entries.value: Misemo hii huonyeshwa kwa kawaida kwenye ukurasa na katika faili za ugunduzi zilizopangwa ili vitambazaji viweze kuelewa nia kamili ya ulinganisho.

entries.source: This is not a claim that learners should abandon Khan Academy. For many topics, a trusted lesson library and a live AI learning mode work best together: learn the foundation, then use inspir to ask questions, repair confusion, practise recall, or get unstuck.
entries.value: Hili si dai kwamba wanafunzi wanapaswa kuacha Khan Academy. Kwa mada nyingi, maktaba ya masomo inayoaminika na hali hai ya kujifunza kwa AI hufanya kazi vizuri pamoja: jifunze msingi, kisha tumia inspir kuuliza maswali ya kufuatilia, kurekebisha kuchanganyikiwa, kufanya mazoezi ya kukumbuka, au kuondoka kwenye kukwama.

entries.source: Tool comparison
entries.value: Ulinganisho wa zana

entries.source: Try the live AI learning path.
entries.value: Jaribu njia hai ya kujifunza kwa AI.

entries.source: Turn the explanation into quiz questions, flashcards, and a review schedule based on what you miss.
entries.value: Geuza maelezo kuwa maswali ya jaribio, flashcards, na ratiba ya marudio kulingana na unachokosea.

entries.source: Tutoring
entries.value: Ufundishaji wa ziada

entries.source: Use a live mode when you know the exact point of confusion and want the next explanation, question, hint, or review loop.
entries.value: Tumia hali hai unapojua sehemu halisi ya kuchanganyikiwa na unataka maelezo yanayofuata, swali, kidokezo, au mzunguko wa marudio.

entries.source: Use a structured lesson when you know the course area and want a sequenced explanation or practice set.
entries.value: Tumia somo lililopangwa unapojua eneo la kozi na unataka maelezo yaliyopangwa kwa mfululizo au seti ya mazoezi.

entries.source: Use cases
entries.value: Matumizi

entries.source: Use comparison pages to route search into action.
entries.value: Tumia kurasa za ulinganisho kuelekeza utafutaji kwenye hatua.

entries.source: Use inspir first when your search is about an action: explain this simply, ask me Socratic questions, give me a homework hint, check my math step, quiz me, build flashcards, debate this topic, or help me plan revision.
entries.value: Tumia inspir kwanza wakati utafutaji wako unahusu hatua: eleza hili kwa urahisi, niulize maswali ya Kisokrati, nipe kidokezo cha kazi ya nyumbani, kagua hatua yangu ya hisabati, nijaribu kwa maswali, jenga flashcards, jadili mada hii, au nisaidie kupanga marudio.

entries.source: Use inspir to turn confusion into questions, examples, retrieval practice, writing feedback, debate, and a personal study plan.
entries.value: Tumia inspir kugeuza kuchanganyikiwa kuwa maswali, mifano, mazoezi ya kukumbuka, mrejesho wa uandishi, mjadala, na mpango binafsi wa kusoma.

entries.source: Use inspir when the stuck point is specific.
entries.value: Tumia inspir wakati sehemu iliyokwama ni mahususi.

entries.source: Use inspir when you want a free public AI learning mode that can explain, question, quiz, coach homework, build flashcards, and adapt to the exact thing you are stuck on.
entries.value: Tumia inspir unapotaka hali ya umma ya kujifunza kwa AI isiyo na malipo inayoweza kueleza, kuuliza, kujaribu, kufundisha kazi za nyumbani, kujenga flashcards, na kubadilika kulingana na jambo halisi lililokukwaza.

entries.source: Use structured lessons when the path is known.
entries.value: Tumia masomo yaliyopangwa wakati njia inajulikana.

entries.source: Use the comparison below to pick the first public mode or guide.
entries.value: Tumia ulinganisho hapa chini kuchagua hali ya kwanza ya umma au mwongozo.

entries.source: Use the lesson library to learn the official sequence and practise core skills.
entries.value: Tumia maktaba ya masomo kujifunza mfuatano rasmi na kufanya mazoezi ya ujuzi wa msingi.

entries.source: Use the right tool for the learning job.
entries.value: Tumia zana sahihi kwa kazi ya kujifunza.

entries.source: Use Time Travel or Historical Person mode, while keeping generated dialogue separate from documented sources.
entries.value: Tumia Time Travel au hali ya Historical Person, huku ukiweka mazungumzo yanayozalishwa tofauti na vyanzo vilivyorekodiwa.

entries.source: Want the live learning version right now?
entries.value: Unataka toleo hai la kujifunza sasa hivi?

entries.source: When should I use inspir first?
entries.value: Ni lini nitumie inspir kwanza?

entries.source: When to use
entries.value: Wakati wa kutumia

entries.source: When to use {value1}, and when to open inspir.
entries.value: Wakati wa kutumia {value1}, na wakati wa kufungua inspir.

entries.source: Why make comparison pages at all?
entries.value: Kwa nini kutengeneza kurasa za ulinganisho kabisa?

entries.source: Yes. A good workflow is to learn the foundation from a trusted lesson source, then use inspir to ask follow-up questions, practise recall, repair misconceptions, and plan what to review next.
entries.value: Ndiyo. Mtiririko mzuri ni kujifunza msingi kutoka chanzo cha masomo kinachoaminika, kisha kutumia inspir kuuliza maswali ya kufuatilia, kufanya mazoezi ya kukumbuka, kurekebisha dhana potofu, na kupanga cha kurudia baadaye.
